src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/aspect/.general_idea: Introduce a ThreadLocal variable to propagate user UUID context across the request lifecycle for audit logging.
Remove conditional logging statements that were only active in non-production environments to simplify the aspect logic.
Remove dependency on HttpServletResponse to capture HTTP status codes, simplifying the audit data model.
Remove environment-based branching to ensure audit logs are persisted to MongoDB in all environments, not just production.
Change the default fallback value for missing user UUIDs from 'unknown' to 'anonymous' for consistency.
Correct potential precision loss in duration calculation by ensuring integer arithmetic is used consistently or avoiding implicit float conversion issues.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.general_idea: Renamed the injected statistic service bean to follow standard Spring naming conventions (Service suffix).
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.human_impl: Changed field from `final Statistic statistic` to `final StatisticService statisticService` and updated the import.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.general_idea: Replaced instance method call for bot status with a static access to a global configuration object.
Removed the endpoint for retrieving release strategies as it is no longer needed or handled differently.
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.human_impl: Deleted the `@GetMapping("/release/strategy")` method and its associated logic.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/control.general_idea: Removed the endpoint for retrieving the maximum history count, likely consolidating it into a broader system config endpoint.
Added a new endpoint to retrieve the full system configuration object.
Renamed the Statistic service class to StatisticService to follow Spring naming conventions.
Removed the GET /min endpoint that returned the minimum submission count configuration.
Refactored access to top submission configuration from a direct field getter to a service method call.
Refactored access to max history configuration to use a nested service object and renamed constant.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/pojo/me.general_idea: Add an 'uploader' field to the Submission POJO to track the user who submitted the media.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.general_idea: Updated import statement to reflect the package rename of the Utils class from 'com.bupt.dailyhaha.Utils' to 'com.bupt.dailyhaha.util.Utils'.
Changed the method for retrieving the minimum submissions configuration from a direct getter to a nested object access pattern.
Adjusted the time-based condition for enabling the bot, changing the start hour from 22 to 21.
Improved log messages in the autoRelease method to provide more context about why the bot is enabled or disabled.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.general_idea: Refactored logging in shouldBotEnabled to clearly state the decision outcome (enable/disable) and the reasoning based on submission counts.
src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.human_impl: logger.info("bot should {} because of toBeReviewed: {} needed: {}", b ? "enable" : "disable", toBeReviewed, needed);

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.general_idea: Replaced the integer size check with the isEmpty() method for better readability and modern Java style.
Enhanced error and info logs in the cleanImg method to include specific reasons for failure and counts of deleted images.

src/main/java/com/bupt/dailyhaha/service.general_idea: Changed the shared configuration instance from an instance field to a static field to allow global access without dependency injection.
Expanded comments to clarify the idempotency of the initialization process in multi-instance environments.
